headline: 80-year-old Home Depot rival closes hardware store, no bankruptcy
summary: The home improvement and hardware retail sectors faced a challenging year in 2025, as sales suffered from a continued housing slump and consumers' reluctance to spend in uncertain economic conditions. Industry leader Home Depot's sales declined by 3.8% in its fourth quarter of 2025, ending Feb. 1, ...

headline: Home Depot salaries: From sales rep to CEO
summary: Home Depot is the biggest retailer by market capitalization, and its share price reflects the rise in earnings over the years. While the company rewards its C-suite executives handsomely for meeting internal targets, it also pays attention to its frontline workers in its retail stores. Here’s who ...
